label: HVAC — Duct spool pack
description: Build duct assemblies → seam audit (SMACNA) → flange + hanger schedules → cut list → NC machine file → isometrics. The end-of-design hand-off pack a fabrication shop needs.
notes: Each export honours OutputLocationHelper.GetOutputDirectory(doc) so files land alongside the project.
Re-running is idempotent; existing files are versioned by timestamp.
